## Requested addition

What should be added or improved?

## Target use case

Company, role, market, seniority, or resume style.

## Proposed abstract rule

Write the rule in your own words. Do not paste copyrighted source text.

## Why it matters

Explain how this improves resume tailoring.

## Data safety

Confirm that this request does not include personal resume data, secrets, or raw copyrighted guide text.
